default_binding.PHO_KEEPSAKE: a dried apple blossom and a lock of pale hair

slots.meaning: Ending: the shared flood of memory overwhelms the hero (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: the grandmother is also recovered (success).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: the whole town's memory is restored (success/completion).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: the town is restored, the grandmother left at peace (completion).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: holding the spring's water too long (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The material the hero tries to wall the root off with.
slots.guidance: An ordinary building material that fails against the root.

slots.meaning: Ending: the attempt to wall off the root fails (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: A named townsperson confronted in the square.
slots.guidance: An ordinary elderly resident; used once to make the forgetting concrete.

slots.meaning: The vanished shop named to jog a neighbour's memory.
slots.guidance: A small, everyday livelihood; used once for concreteness.

slots.meaning: The forgotten spouse named in that confrontation.
slots.guidance: The person the town has already forgotten; named once.

slots.meaning: Ending: shouting the town's names reaches no one (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: refusing the empty keeper's place outright (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: taking the keeper's place too hastily (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: refusing to risk any memory at all (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: giving up too precious a memory (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The vanished street the root can temporarily restore.
slots.guidance: A concrete, walkable stretch of the town, lent rather than given.

slots.meaning: Ending: the town makes peace with its losses instead (neutral).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: the shared ritual begins before the town has gathered (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The specific childhood game recalled about the neighbour girl.
slots.guidance: A small, ordinary detail that makes the lost girl vivid.

slots.meaning: Ending: learning who would be saved, without paying (neutral).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: trying to take without giving anything (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: accepting a single fair trade for understanding (neutral).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: forcing the whole truth onto the town at once (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: A specific vanished shop, the story's first concrete proof of loss.
slots.guidance: A small, homely, everyday place; its disappearance must read as mundane, not sinister.

slots.meaning: The below-ground room beneath the cider house.
slots.guidance: Cold, old, sealed; the physical threshold to the spring.

slots.meaning: Ending: rebarring the cellar door backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: retreating up the cellar stair backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The adjective describing how the cellar door/bar is sealed shut.
slots.guidance: A living, grown-over seal; unlocked by force, not a key.

slots.meaning: The building over the cellar where the climax takes place.
slots.guidance: A working, disused outbuilding; unremarkable from outside.

slots.meaning: The hero's local cousin, a recurring ally.
slots.guidance: Warm, loyal, increasingly unsettled as the town's memory frays.

slots.meaning: The recurring seasonal deadline pressing on every route.
slots.guidance: A natural, survivable turning point, not a hard cutoff; never lethal.

slots.meaning: The town's founding generation, who first struck the bargain.
slots.guidance: A collective, sympathetic ancestor-figure, not villains.

slots.meaning: The hero's deceased grandmother, the previous keeper.
slots.guidance: Never on-page alive; present only in memory, records, and the spring.

slots.meaning: The protagonist, referred to by first name throughout.
slots.guidance: A teenager returning to a place tied to their family; observant, stubborn.

slots.meaning: The protagonist's full name, used once at the opening.
slots.guidance: First and family name together; only appears in the opening line.

slots.meaning: The tallied artifact recording every past keeper.
slots.guidance: A cord or equivalent tally object with one knot/mark per keeper.

slots.meaning: The generic title for whoever tends the bargain with the root.
slots.guidance: A role, not a name; used for 'the last _', 'empty _ knot', etc.

slots.meaning: Ending: vowing to starve the root backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: cutting the keeper cord backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The current keeper, referred to by first name thereafter.
slots.guidance: Wise, blunt, physically frail but sure of the myth's rules.

slots.meaning: The current keeper's full name, used once on first mention.
slots.guidance: First and family name; an elderly, blind orchard-keeper.

slots.meaning: Where the hero climbs to find the keeper.
slots.guidance: An exposed, wind-worn high place; distinct from the other three sites.

slots.meaning: A specific lost child the hero can choose to save.
slots.guidance: A named-in-spirit but unnamed neighbour, remembered by a small vivid detail.

slots.meaning: The single ancient tree whose root drinks the town's memory.
slots.guidance: The living source of the whole myth; ancient, not overtly monstrous.

slots.meaning: Ending: choosing one certain rescue over a bigger risk (success).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: hesitating too long costs the rescue (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: one lost person is restored to the town (success).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The grove/land that gives the town its identity and economy.
slots.guidance: The town's defining feature; source of both its livelihood and its myth.

slots.meaning: The named curse/mystery: the town's slow, selective forgetting.
slots.guidance: A proper-noun-like name for the amnesia itself, spoken with familiarity.

slots.meaning: The one album that never changes.
slots.guidance: A bound collection, notably heavier/stranger than the rest.

slots.meaning: Ending: burning the fading prints backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: sealing away the strange album backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: A pressed keepsake found inside the strange album.
slots.guidance: A small, personal, non-photographic memento.

slots.meaning: Where the hero examines the family photographs.
slots.guidance: A private, domestic space; distinct from the other three sites.

slots.meaning: The recurring picture medium at the heart of this route.
slots.guidance: Ordinary family photographs/prints; some change, some do not.

slots.meaning: Ending: pressing the records clerk backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The centuries-old lease ledger read in the second approach.
slots.guidance: A legal record spanning generations; distinct from the register.

slots.meaning: Ending: stealing the founding lease backfires (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The records-office clerk the hero questions.
slots.guidance: A minor official losing his own grip on the archive; anxious, not sinister.

slots.meaning: The vital-records book with blanked-out entries.
slots.guidance: A register of births/deaths; entries fade rather than being crossed out.

slots.meaning: Where the hero searches official records.
slots.guidance: A civic archive; distinct from the other three investigation sites.

slots.meaning: A specific class photograph with faces scratched out.
slots.guidance: A concrete, disturbing artifact proving deliberate past loss.

slots.meaning: The antagonist force: the tree's root that drinks memory.
slots.guidance: Patient, exacting, not malicious; a force to bargain with, not defeat.

slots.meaning: Ending: the crowd's shared vow collapses at the last moment (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: The pool of water at the root's heart where bargains are struck.
slots.guidance: Not merely water: it holds and can return lost memories.

slots.meaning: The physical token marking someone who may bargain at the spring.
slots.guidance: A small carried object; its state (withered/greening) is plot, kept outside the slot.

slots.meaning: The town itself, the bounded community the story happens in.
slots.guidance: A small, close-knit place; used both by name and as 'the town'.

slots.meaning: The town's central public gathering place.
slots.guidance: Where the community can be seen and addressed at once.

slots.meaning: Ending: a fair, bittersweet one-for-one trade (neutral).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: asking the root for more than it will give (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: becoming a light, recurring keeper (neutral).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: Ending: refusing to trade anything, keeping the town diminished (setback).
slots.guidance: Holds this ending's full title text as one unit.

slots.meaning: A civic monument whose names no one can place anymore.
slots.guidance: A public record of names, used once to open the mystery.
